title: REIMER: 90-day Implementation Plan
description:
The final implementation plan is a result of initializing a  root cause analysis with the focus of creating a 90 day content plan with a specific focus on location pages, meaning it addresses some related issues that take priority over just building landing pages.

Audit findings and overview ( 90-day Plan )

title: Plumbing pages optimization
description:
Hi Mubeen,

Seeking help if we can have their plumbing pages optimized inline with their request to add a banner this coming holiday. We are still working on getting the banner and the link it will use for their homepage. But client would also like take this opportunity to review and update our plumbing pages to maximize leads and calls. 

This will be applicable to their Atlantic North brands too but I will create separate tasks for them. 

Thanks much!

description:
Hi Mubeen,

Seeking help create a plan to implement to help with their electrical services calls and leads from both the website and GBP. As per client they noticed that there hasn’t been much improvement for it.

Thanks much!

CC
